description_long: This is a modern office swivel chair with a high, slightly curved backrest upholstered in dark fabric. The seat is wide and padded, matching the backrest in material and color, providing ergonomic comfort. The chair features two armrests made of molded plastic, attached to the seat and backrest for support. Its base consists of a sturdy, five-legged star-shaped structure with casters for mobility, all made from black plastic or metal. A central support column connects the seat to the base, likely containing a pneumatic height adjustment mechanism, though no levers are visibly protruding. The overall design is utilitarian and functional, suitable for office or workspace environments.
description: A dark, high-back swivel chair with padded seat and backrest, plastic armrests, and a five-legged wheeled base. The design is ergonomic and functional, ideal for office use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full padded backrest, wide seat, and both armrests clearly.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the chair's depth, the angle of the backrest, and the triangular armrest support.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the smooth, unadorned backrest and the central support column.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the backrest's tilt and armrest structure.
attribute_central_support_column: A cylindrical, black central support column, likely metal with a plastic cover, connecting the seat to the five-legged base; may contain a pneumatic adjustment mechanism.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, slightly curved, and padded backrest with a rounded top, upholstered in dark fabric, smooth with no visible patterns or cutouts.
attribute_armrest_style: Pair of black plastic armrests, angular in shape, attached to both the seat and backrest, forming a supportive triangle.
